handoff.reason: Python integrity fix; PS re-scan blocker

execution_rules.notes: Single-phase; integrator lane. Fix already implemented + verified during diagnosis.

hard_constraints: No enum changes; validator stays strict

decisions_log.note: Two root causes via CLI-instrumented validation: (1) cross-language false-resolution (Python set()->TS set, 53 edges), (2) missing file-grain node for module-level call source files (167 edges). NOT an export-edge bug as first hypothesized - all 220 were resolved CALL edges. CLI-only repro because the bug needs the full Python+TS element set; minimal fixtures under-reproduced until the set()/TS-set collision was isolated.

communication_log.message: WO from STUB-M3GE4S. Two surgical fixes landed: call-resolver language guard + buildNodes call-source coverage. PS 220->0 errors.
